status_marker: public LaunchRoom test package / not AIRMIDA authority
blocked_without_gate: secret readback or storage in chat/artifacts

transition_protocol.current_stage_rule: Always identify the active stage before advising or acting.
transition_protocol.advance_rule: Advance only when all required gate_checks for the active stage are pass, not_applicable with reason, or explicitly accepted by owner.
transition_protocol.blocked_rule: If a gate is missing, stop with a blocked report and exactly one safe next action.
